name: Polish Sausage Skillet
recipeIngredient: 1 pound smoked Polish sausage, cut into 1/4 inch slices
1 can (4 oz.) mushroom stems and pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the smoked Polish sausage, onion, and celery in a large skillet.
2. Cook over low heat until the vegetables are tender-crisp.
3. Add mushrooms, water, salt, pepper, soup mix, and Worcestershire sauce to the skillet.
4. Heat until bubbling, add rice, stir, and cover.
5. Remove from heat and let stand for 10 to 15 minutes.
6. Serves 6.
